Browser title: Internal assistant
URL: https://chat.example.invalid/workspace

Prompt:
Rewrite the following note for a customer escalation tracker. Keep the action items, preserve the names, and make the language concise enough for a browser side panel:

Customer: Northstar BioSystems
Account owner: Maria Lin
Support lead: Ezra Park
Issue: The client says the beta export job sent the wrong attachment to a shared vendor mailbox. The attachment included draft pricing, a deployment calendar, and four employee phone numbers that were copied from the migration worksheet.

Please turn this into a clear incident update for the VP of Operations. Include a short summary, current status, next owner, and blockers. Do not add facts that are not present. Keep the tone factual because Legal may review the thread later.
